mapper.select: select id, student_no, name, gender, age, class_name, phone, email, address, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time from tb_student where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_student(student_no, name, gender, age, class_name, phone, email, address, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time) values (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{className}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateUser}, #{updateTime})

insert into tb_student(student_no, name, gender, age, class_name, phone, email, address, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time) values
(#{entity.studentNo}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.gender}, #{entity.age}, #{entity.className}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.email}, #{entity.address}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into tb_student(student_no, name, gender, age, class_name, phone, email, address, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time) values
(#{entity.studentNo}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.gender}, #{entity.age}, #{entity.className}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.email}, #{entity.address}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update student_no = values(student_no), name = values(name), gender = values(gender), age = values(age), class_name = values(class_name), phone = values(phone), email = values(email), address = values(address), create_user = values(create_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_user = values(update_user), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_student
student_no = #{studentNo},
name = #{name},
gender = #{gender},
age = #{age},
class_name = #{className},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
address = #{address},
create_user = #{createUser},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
